zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY於大約1230年出生在艾歐洛時，她的父親Guillaume de Chauvigny40歲，母親Mahaut de LUSIGNAN22歲。她於大約1248年與Robert IV de BEAUMIERS結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1323年享年95歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY was born about 1230, in Europe, her father, Guillaume de Chauvigny, was 40 and her mother, Mahaut de LUSIGNAN, was 22. She married Robert IV de BEAUMIERS about 1248. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1323, at the age of 95.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY родилась около 1230 г. в местности Европа, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Chauvigny было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de LUSIGNAN, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert IV de BEAUMIERS около 1248 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1323 г. в возрасте 95 лет.
